---
title: "Schedule"
---

Lecture status is driven by each lecture's `manifest.yml` (`migrated` / `planned` / `legacy-pdf`).
Automating this table from the manifests is a Phase-1 task (v4 §6) — for now it is maintained by
hand.

| # | Lecture | Status | Links |
|---|---------|--------|-------|
| 02 | Reconstruction attacks | scaffolded (host path ready; WASM needs libdpy wheel) | [slides](lectures/02-reconstruction/slides.qmd) |

See [STATUS.md](STATUS.md) for live progress.
